results: Policy endpoint includes technology_data_ip and selected commercial_dependency records needed for technology/data/IP semantics.
Repository buckets separate IP, standards, data_access, integration and cloud_compute semantics.
Frontend local fallback and server hydration expose the same technology buckets.
Integration assertions prevent cloud/compute dependencies from being treated as control relations.
non_claims: Does not implement a standalone technology scoring model or new formula.
Does not certify production-reviewed IP, standards, data-access or cloud contracts.
Does not close A202, A209, A210, A026/A027, A204/A205 or MVP release readiness.
